case_title: JAY RENDON VS. BOB CARROLL ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENDON, JAY TRUSTEE OF THE ALICIA RENDON LIVING TRUST DATED DECMEBER 14, 2020 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARROLL, BOB DOES 1-20 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PARKING SPOT COMMONLY DESCRIBED AS THE PARKING SPOT TO THE LEFT OF THE SUPPORT BEAM IN THE SOUTHWESTERN MOST PARKING GARAGE ON SAN JOSE AVENUE, CLOSEST TO THE CORNER OF PILGRIM AVENUS AND SAN JOSE AVENUE, OF THE BUILING LOCATED AT AND COMMONLY KNOWN AS 1770 SAN JOSE AVE CITY & COUNTY OF SF, CA 94112, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100181602)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $ 1.66 PER DAY . (TRANSACTION ID # 100181602) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RENDON, JAY TRUSTEE OF THE ALICIA RENDON LIVING TRUST DATED DECMEBER 14, 2020
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100182595)
